name: Bank of Canada Target for the Overnight Rate
notes: BoC Valet V39079 — the Bank's headline policy rate. Verified live 2026-05-28 (2.25%). Keyless JSON API.

name: Government of Canada 2-Year Benchmark Bond Yield
notes: BoC Valet BD.CDN.2YR.DQ.YLD — GoC benchmark bond yields. Short end of the CAD curve. Verified live 2026-05-28.

name: Government of Canada 10-Year Benchmark Bond Yield
notes: BoC Valet BD.CDN.10YR.DQ.YLD — GoC benchmark bond yields. Verified live 2026-05-28 (3.47%).

name: Bank of Canada CPI-median (Core Inflation)
notes: BoC Valet CPI_MEDIAN — median YoY %-change of CPI components; a preferred-core inflation measure. Verified live 2026-05-28 (2.1%).

name: USD/CAD Daily Average Exchange Rate
notes: BoC Valet FXUSDCAD — daily average value of 1 US dollar in Canadian dollars. Verified live 2026-05-28 (1.38).
